description_long: This is a heavily equipped police officer dressed in dark tactical gear, including a full-body suit with reinforced padding and a bulletproof vest. The officer wears a black gas mask with round eye lenses and a blue filter, providing respiratory protection in hazardous environments. The uniform features multiple utility pouches, a radio with an antenna, and a holstered sidearm, indicating readiness for urban operations. Both sleeves display a Union Jack patch, suggesting affiliation with a UK-based law enforcement or special response unit. The boots are sturdy and designed for urban terrain, while the gloves and elbow pads offer additional protection. The overall appearance is that of a specialized tactical or counter-terrorism officer prepared for high-risk scenarios.
description: A UK-affiliated tactical police officer in dark body armor, gas mask, and utility gear, equipped for urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gas mask, tactical vest, utility pouches, and holstered sidearm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the radio antenna, utility pouches, and Union Jack patch on the sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the vest, additional pouches, and the radio setup.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the holstered sidearm, more pouches, and another Union Jack patch.
attribute_uniform_type: Dark tactical police uniform with long sleeves, reinforced pants, tactical vest, utility pouches, and protective gloves and boots.
attribute_police_insignia: Union Jack patch on both shoulders
attribute_headgear_style: Full-face black gas mask with round eye lenses and blue filter, integrated with a black helmet.
